perturbation.original_text: 2. DEFINITIONS: INITIAL DISTRIBUTION PERIOD: April 15, 2000 through October 15, 2000 (6 Months from the Effective Date) PRODUCTS: The CircuiTest 2000S In-Circuit Test System The CircuiTest 2100 Scanner Expansion EXCLUSIVE TERRITORIES: The 48 Contiguous United States EFFECTIVE DATE: The earlier of the date Comware orders and pays for a minimum of $22,710 worth of Products, in any combination, or April 15, 2000.
perturbation.changed_text: 2. DEFINITIONS: INITIAL DISTRIBUTION PERIOD: April 15, 2000 through October 15, 2000 (6 Months from the Effective Date) EXCLUSIVE TERRITORIES: The 48 Contiguous United States EFFECTIVE DATE: The earlier of the date Comware orders and pays for a minimum of $22,710 worth of Products, in any combination, or April 15, 2000.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the definition of 'PRODUCTS', subsequent clauses that refer to specific products and discounts become ambiguous. The contract refers to purchasing specified 'Products' at discounted rates, but without defining the exact items considered 'Products', the enforcement of pricing and purchase obligations becomes uncertain.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3. EXCLUSIVE RIGHTS: Upon the effective date of this agreement COMWARE shall have the exclusive right to purchase, at the DISCOUNTS described below, and resell Products to potential customers during the Initial Distribution Period, based on the following terms and conditions: (a) COMWARE must purchase no less than $22,710.00 worth of Products, in any combination, by April 15, 2000. This initial order shall be evidenced by valid purchase order from COMWARE to be received by ITS no later than 5:00PM April 1, 2000, with payment to be received by ITS no later than April 15, 2000. In the event either of these dates are not met, this Agreement will automatically and immediately terminate and neither of the parties hereto will have any further obligations, one to the other. (b) Future Purchase Orders and delivery will approximate the 15 day delivery schedule (but not the dates), although payment will be made by COMWARE to ITS no later than thirty (30) days after receipt of invoice from ITS. (c) Provided COMWARE purchases the initial products as in (a) above, COMWARE shall have the right to purchase additional Products up to a total of $45,420.00 at the following discounts: 1 INITIAL DISCOUNTS: PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION SUGGESTED RETAIL PRICE DISCOUNT PRICE TO COMWARE ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- CircuiTest 2000S $5,995.00 45% $3,297.25 CircuiTest 2100 Scanner $2,995.00 56% $1,317.80 (INTERNATIONAL TEST SYSTEMS RESERVES THE RIGHT TO CHANGE THE RETAIL PRICE AT ANY TIME, WITH NOTICE TO COMWARE.) (d) In the event COMWARE purchases products in excess of $45,420.00 during the Initial Distribution Period, COMWARE shall have the right to purchase additional Products at the following discounts: SUBSEQUENT DISCOUNTS: PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION SUGGESTED RETAIL PRICE DISCOUNT PRICE TO COMWARE ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- CircuiTest 2000S $5,995.00 50% $2,997.50 CircuiTest 2100 Scanner $2,995.00 60% $1,198.00 (INTERNATIONAL TEST SYSTEMS RESERVES THE RIGHT TO CHANGE THE RETAIL PRICE AT ANY TIME, WITH NOTICE TO COMWARE.)
perturbation.justification: The removal of the 'PRODUCTS' definition creates a strong contradiction. The original text defined 'PRODUCTS' as 'The CircuiTest 2000S In-Circuit Test System The CircuiTest 2100 Scanner Expansion'. The contradicted text refers to 'Products' and even provides discounts for specific products (CircuiTest 2000S and CircuiTest 2100 Scanner). Without the definition, it is unclear what products are subject to the discounts and purchase obligations outlined in section 3. This ambiguity directly impacts the enforceability of the contract and creates a clear contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 8. WARRANTY: ITS Products are warranted free from defects of material or workmanship for 3 years after shipment from the manufacturer. Equipment purchased from ITS, which becomes defective within that time period will be repaired by ITS at its headquarters in San Antonio, Texas at no cost to COMWARE beyond cost of shipping the equipment to ITS. ITS will bear the cost of returning the item to COMWARE by UPS, REGULAR DELIVERY. priority shipping costs will be borne by COMWARE. This warranty is contingent upon proper use and installation of the Products and does not cover equipment which has been modified without ITS' consent or which has been subjected to unusual physical or electrical stress or on which the original identification marks have been removed or altered.
perturbation.changed_text: 8. WARRANTY: ITS Products are warranted free from defects of material or workmanship for 3 years after shipment from the manufacturer. Equipment purchased from ITS, which becomes defective within that time period will be repaired by ITS at its headquarters in San Antonio, Texas at no cost to COMWARE beyond cost of shipping the equipment to ITS.  This warranty is contingent upon proper use and installation of the Products and does not cover equipment which has been modified without ITS' consent or which has been subjected to unusual physical or electrical stress or on which the original identification marks have been removed or altered.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the sentence 'ITS will bear the cost of returning the item to COMWARE by UPS, REGULAR DELIVERY. priority shipping costs will be borne by COMWARE.' from the warranty clause, it creates an ambiguity regarding who is responsible for the return shipping costs. The previous sentence states ITS will repair at no cost 'beyond cost of shipping the equipment to ITS', but now it's unclear who pays for the return trip, causing a direct conflict in the implications of the warranty's cost coverage and potentially deterring COMWARE from utilizing the warranty due to unforeseen expenses.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 8. WARRANTY: ITS Products are warranted free from defects of material or workmanship for 3 years after shipment from the manufacturer. Equipment purchased from ITS, which becomes defective within that time period will be repaired by ITS at its headquarters in San Antonio, Texas at no cost to COMWARE beyond cost of shipping the equipment to ITS.  This warranty is contingent upon proper use and installation of the Products and does not cover equipment which has been modified without ITS' consent or which has been subjected to unusual physical or electrical stress or on which the original identification marks have been removed or altered.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly stated who bears the return shipping costs. By removing the sentence 'ITS will bear the cost of returning the item to COMWARE by UPS, REGULAR DELIVERY. priority shipping costs will be borne by COMWARE.', the changed text creates an ambiguity regarding return shipping costs, directly conflicting with the implied understanding of the original warranty terms and the phrase 'at no cost to COMWARE beyond cost of shipping the equipment to ITS' found in both the changed and contradicted texts. This omission introduces an in-text contradiction as it creates uncertainty about the financial responsibilities of each party under the warranty, thus meeting the definition of 'Omissions – In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: 5. MINIMUM ORDERS TO MAINTAIN AGREEMENT: COMWARE must purchase order a minimum of $4,200 worth of Products per month during the Renewal Period TO maintain the terms and conditions of this Agreement. In the event COMWARE does not meet these minimum purchase requirements, this Agreement will automatically and immediately terminate and neither of the parties hereto will have any further obligations, one to the other.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. MINIMUM ORDERS TO MAINTAIN AGREEMENT: COMWARE must purchase order a minimum amount of Products per month during the Renewal Period TO maintain the terms and conditions of this Agreement. In the event COMWARE does not meet these minimum purchase requirements, this Agreement will automatically and immediately terminate and neither of the parties hereto will have any further obligations, one to the other.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the specified amount of '$4,200', creates an in-text contradiction in maintaining this agreement. The agreement has an in-text contradiction because in paragraph 3 it dictates specific monetary amount of the products in order to keep the agreement in place, by removing this amount it makes the amount of products in paragraph 3 contradict the new amount to maintain the agreement in this paragraph.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3. EXCLUSIVE RIGHTS: Upon the effective date of this agreement COMWARE shall have the exclusive right to purchase, at the DISCOUNTS described below, and resell Products to potential customers during the Initial Distribution Period, based on the following terms and conditions: (a) COMWARE must purchase no less than $22,710.00 worth of Products, in any combination, by April 15, 2000. This initial order shall be evidenced by valid purchase order from COMWARE to be received by ITS no later than 5:00PM April 1, 2000, with payment to be received by ITS no later than April 15, 2000. In the event either of these dates are not met, this Agreement will automatically and immediately terminate and neither of the parties hereto will have any further obligations, one to the other. (b) Future Purchase Orders and delivery will approximate the 15 day delivery schedule (but not the dates), although payment will be made by COMWARE to ITS no later than thirty (30) days after receipt of invoice from ITS. (c) Provided COMWARE purchases the initial products as in (a) above, COMWARE shall have the right to purchase additional Products up to a total of $45,420.00 at the following discounts: 1 INITIAL DISCOUNTS: PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION SUGGESTED RETAIL PRICE DISCOUNT PRICE TO COMWARE ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- CircuiTest 2000S $5,995.00 45% $3,297.25 CircuiTest 2100 Scanner $2,995.00 56% $1,317.80 (INTERNATIONAL TEST SYSTEMS RESERVES THE RIGHT TO CHANGE THE RETAIL PRICE AT ANY TIME, WITH NOTICE TO COMWARE.) (d) In the event COMWARE purchases products in excess of $45,420.00 during the Initial Distribution Period, COMWARE shall have the right to purchase additional Products at the following discounts: SUBSEQUENT DISCOUNTS: PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION SUGGESTED RETAIL PRICE DISCOUNT PRICE TO COMWARE ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- CircuiTest 2000S $5,995.00 50% $2,997.50 CircuiTest 2100 Scanner $2,995.00 60% $1,198.00 (INTERNATIONAL TEST SYSTEMS RESERVES THE RIGHT TO CHANGE THE RETAIL PRICE AT ANY TIME, WITH NOTICE TO COMWARE.)
perturbation.justification: The changed text in section 5 removes the specific monetary amount ($4,200) required to maintain the agreement. This directly contradicts section 3, which dictates specific monetary amounts ($22,710.00 and $45,420.00) for product purchases and determines the discounts COMWARE receives. By eliminating the $4,200 minimum in section 5, the requirements for maintaining the agreement become ambiguous and conflict with the specific financial obligations outlined in section 3, thus creating an in-text contradiction as defined by the 'Omissions – In Text Contradiction' perturbation type.
